pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly sets PROJECT_DIR to this path.
Modbus protocol standard and the stub file modbus/crc.py explicitly define the CRC-16 polynomial as 0xA001.
Counted the test functions generated in setup_task.sh across the test_*.py files. There are exactly 19 tests, despite verifier.py checking for 20.
verifier.py checks if the score >= 60 to determine if the task passed.

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in the project directory /home/ga/PycharmProjects/modbus_rtu. The correct Modbus CRC-16 polynomial is 0xA001. There are actually only 19 tests generated in the test suite, contradicting the claim of 20 tests (making the 10-point 'all tests passed' bonus in verifier.py unreachable). The passing threshold score is 60.
